## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the use case and pain point first.

## Solution

Describe the solution you would like to see.

## Alternatives

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Component

Which part of ZGate does this affect?

- [ ] API Gateway
- [ ] Dashboard UI
- [ ] Provider Executor
- [ ] RTK
- [ ] Memory System
- [ ] Combo / Fallback
- [ ] CLI Tool
- [ ] Admin Dashboard
- [ ] Other

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.
